description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image, with a global before_script that runs bundle install and a variable JEKYLL_ENV set to production. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes chmod +x "./create_models.sh", chmod +x "./create_redirects.sh", ./create_models.sh, ./create_redirects.sh, and bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs the same chmod and script commands, then bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
